name: Magical Musket - Fiendish Deal
name_jp: <ruby lang="jp"><rb>魔</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>ま</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>弾</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>だん</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby>－デビルズ・ディール
desc: "Magical Musket" monsters you control cannot be destroyed by card effects. If this card in your possession is sent to your GY by an opponent's card effect: You can add 1 "Magical Musket" card from your Deck or GY to your hand, except "Magical Musket - Fiendish Deal". You can only activate 1 "Magical Musket - Fiendish Deal" per turn.
eff: "Magical Musket" monsters you control cannot be destroyed by card effects. mst: Cannot be destroyed by card effects
